200# return «

User rating: item not rated yet

Fighter type: Archer

Introduced in: Special offer

 

Write a review Send to Discord

Rate this item


description 2/6

Each of the Armor Breaker’s attacks reduces the physical armor of the target by 2% for 4 sec. Up to 5 effects.

description 4/6

Each of the Armor Breaker’s attacks reduces the physical armor of the target by 5% for 5 sec. Up to 5 effects. Every 3 sec, the Armor Breaker makes an extra attack, dealing pure damage equal to 125% of the target’s physical armor. This attack has a 30% chance to deal additional physical damage equal to 5% of the Armor Breaker’s current health.

description 6/6

Each of the Armor Breaker’s attacks reduces the physical armor of the target by 10% for 6 sec. Up to 5 effects. Every 3 sec, the Armor Breaker makes an extra attack, dealing pure damage equal to 250% of the target’s physical armor. This attack has a 50% chance to deal additional physical damage equal to 15% of the Armor Breaker’s current health. The Armor Breaker’s preferred target is always the enemy with the greatest armor. At the beginning of the Armor Breaker increases their own health by 30% of the max health, but every second the Armor Breaker takes 125000 physical damage. The effect lasts for the duration of the battle and is not removed on death. The less health the Armor Breaker has, the higher their attack speed. Max value: 50%; min value 0%. When the Armor Breaker takes 200000 damage, the nearest enemy takes physical damage equal to 400% of the Armor Breaker’s armor.


Substance of Chaos

description 2/6

When attacking, Armor Breaker has a 25% chance to tear the target’s armor. When the enemy’s armor is torn, that enemy takes 100000 pure damage and has their physical armor reduced by 25% for 5 sec. Stacks up to 5 times. Also, that enemy takes 200000 physical damage over 5 sec.

description 4/6

When attacking, Armor Breaker has a 25% chance to tear the target’s armor. When the enemy’s armor is torn, that enemy takes 100000 pure damage and has their physical armor reduced by 25% for 5 sec. Stacks up to 5 times. Also, that enemy takes 200000 physical damage over 5 sec. The Armor Breaker’s attacks have a 60% chance to restore 25% health. When healed, an Armor Breaker has a 60% chance to increase their max health by 5% for 5 sec. Up to 7 times.

description 6/6

When attacking, Armor Breaker has a 25% chance to tear the target’s armor. When the enemy’s armor is torn, that enemy takes 100000 pure damage and has their physical armor reduced by 25% for 5 sec. Stacks up to 5 times. Also, that enemy takes 200000 physical damage over 5 sec. The Armor Breaker’s attacks have a 60% chance to restore 25% health. When healed, an Armor Breaker has a 60% chance to increase their max health by 5% for 5 sec. Up to 7 times. The less health the Armor Breaker has, the higher their damage. Max value : 30000.


Substance of Greatness

description 2/6

Instead of reducing physical armor when attacking, the Armor Breaker steals that armor.

description 4/6

Instead of reducing physical armor when attacking, the Armor Breaker steals that armor. Once in a while, the Armor Breaker’s magic armor is increased by 50% of the Armor Breaker’s physical armor.

description 6/6

Instead of reducing physical armor when attacking, the Armor Breaker steals that armor. Once in a while, the Armor Breaker’s magic armor is increased by 50% of the Armor Breaker’s physical armor. The less health the Armor Breaker has, the higher their physical armor. Max value : 30000.


Substance of Harmony

description 2/6

The Armor Breaker’s attack have a 40% chance to blind the target for 5 sec. The blinded unit has a 60% chance to miss their target.

description 4/6

The Armor Breaker’s attack have a 40% chance to blind the target for 5 sec. The blinded unit has a 60% chance to miss their target. The physical armor of the Armor Breaker is increased by 15% for each enemy alive.

description 6/6

The Armor Breaker’s attack have a 40% chance to blind the target for 5 sec. The blinded unit has a 60% chance to miss their target. The physical armor of the Armor Breaker is increased by 15% for each enemy alive. The Armor Breaker cannot be stripped of armor, disarmed, or silenced.

Materials

Steel Press
Compressed Energy

Dungeon chest
Eyepieces

purchase in:
Portal chest for dark souls

purchase in:
Gem Bay chest
